understanding.goal_understanding: Reach the goal gem tile marked `+` on each level by navigating a tile grid while avoiding spikes, using a limited number of turns and attempts per level.
understanding.mechanics_understanding: MOVE_LEFT/RIGHT shifts horizontally then auto-falls in the current gravity direction until landing on a safe tile, hitting a hazard, or reaching the goal. CLICK removes targeted breakable blocks (`x`). Spikes (`u`/`v`) cause instant failure. UNDO reverts the prior action. Corridor scan and landing previews help plan passages between sections.

understanding.goal_understanding: Reach the goal gem tile marked `+` on each level by navigating a tile grid while avoiding spikes, using a limited number of turns and attempts per level.
understanding.mechanics_understanding: MOVE_LEFT/RIGHT shifts horizontally then auto-falls in the current gravity direction until landing on a safe tile, hitting a hazard, or reaching the goal.
